$schema_comment: org or repos to analyze. 'since' is the global start date (ISO). repo_overrides[repo].since may be an ISO date OR a 40-char commit SHA (resolved to its timestamp). wiki_repos lists BASE repo names (without .wiki) whose wiki should be cloned via https://github.com/<name>.wiki.git. author_map maps a git email OR a git name to a canonical GitHub login, to merge contributors whose commits aren't linked to a GitHub account.
